text:
LONG NAME: MFP_QLFYD_RSDNC_CD 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 2 

FILE(S): Money Follows the Person 

SOURCE: T-MSIS annual demographic and eligibility TAF 

VALUES: 00 = Default- No MFP Participation 
01 = Home owned by participant 
02 = Home owned by family member 
03 = Apartment leased by participant, not assisted living 
04 = Apartment leased by participant, assisted living 
05 = Group home of no more than 4 people 
Null/missing = source value is missing or unknown 

COMMENT: — 
 ^ Back to TOC ^
